212‚Üí            showSnackbar(getString(R.string.multimedia_editor_something_wrong), Snackbar.LENGTH_SHORT)
213‚Üí            return
214‚Üí        }
215‚Üí
216‚Üí        val ordinal = viewPager.currentItem
217‚Üí        val template = tempModel!!.getTemplate(ordinal)
218‚Üí        val templateName = template.getString("name")
219‚Üí
220‚Üí        if (deck != null && getColUnsafe.decks.isDyn(deck.deckId)) {
221‚Üí            Timber.w("Attempted to set default deck of %s to dynamic deck %s", templateName, deck.name)
222‚Üí            showSnackbar(getString(R.string.multimedia_editor_something_wrong), Snackbar.LENGTH_SHORT)
223‚Üí            return
224‚Üí        }
225‚Üí
226‚Üí        val message: String = if (deck == null) {
227‚Üí            Timber.i("Removing default template from template '%s'", templateName)
228‚Üí            template.put("did", JSONObject.NULL)
229‚Üí            getString(R.string.model_manager_deck_override_removed_message, templateName)
230‚Üí        } else {

232‚Üí            template.put("did", deck.deckId)
233‚Üí            getString(R.string.model_manager_deck_override_added_message, templateName, deck.name)
234‚Üí        }
235‚Üí

240‚Üí    }
